name: Yosenju Oroshi Channeling
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>颪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おろし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If you control no monsters: Activate 1 of the following effects; also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Yosenju" monsters.
● Add 1 Level 5 or higher "Yosenju" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Place 1 "Yosenju Shinchu L" and 1 "Yosenju Shinchu R" from your Deck in your Pendulum Zones, but destroy them during your opponent's next End Phase.
eff:
If you control no monsters: Activate 1 of the following effects; also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Yosenju" monsters.
● Add 1 Level 5 or higher "Yosenju" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Place 1 "Yosenju Shinchu L" and 1 "Yosenju Shinchu R" from your Deck in your Pendulum Zones, but destroy them during your opponent's next End Phase.

action: Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
